name: Shabib ibn Harith
title: Chivalrous of Karbala
shortDescription: A hero present in Karbala who manfully wielded his sword defending the Ahl al-Bayt on Ashura and was martyred.
fullStory:
Shabib ibn Harith was one of the pious and brave men whose name is mentioned among the martyrs of Karbala in authentic Ziyarat texts.

With a deep understanding of the path of truth, he joined Imam Hussain's (AS) caravan. On the day of Ashura, with the start of the arrow barrage from the Kufan soldiers, Shabib, along with the other Ansar heroes, made his life a shield for the Ahl al-Bayt (AS).

In the collective morning attack (the first attack), which was the most dangerous and heaviest moment of the battle, Shabib valiantly defended with a drawn sword. He stood manfully against the flood of Kufan crowds.

After a fierce battle and repelling the enemy's cowardly attacks, Shabib ibn Harith attained the grace of martyrdom due to arrow strikes and sword wounds, reaching eternal bliss.
quote: (From Ziyarat Nahiya:) Peace be upon Shabib ibn Harith.
